headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Palo Alto Networks, Raises Price Target to $235
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Richard Poland   maintains Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $200 to $235.

headline: Palo Alto Networks CEO Warns AI Is Quickly Uncovering Years Of 'Bad Code'— Calls for Urgent 'Kill Switches'
summary: Palo Alto Networks Inc. CEO Nikesh Arora issued a stark warning regarding the intersection of generative artificial intelligence (AI) and enterprise cybersecurity, emphasizing that the tech industry faces a rapidly closing window to secure AI agents and patch legacy vulnerabilities.
